templates.name: Engineer
templates.description: A general-purpose software engineer agent that works GitHub issues across authorized repositories, creates feature branches, and opens pull requests into main.

templates.name: GitHub
templates.description: Everything an agent needs to work GitHub as itself: the GitHub App channel (its @mention identity and credentials), the gh CLI in its sandbox, and the skill that turns the App's private key into a working token.

templates.name: Google Sheets
templates.description: Everything an agent needs to work with Google Sheets: the connector (install → Connect Google → read/write spreadsheets) plus a usage skill teaching A1 notation, read-before-write, and the values vs batchUpdate operations. Recommended way to add Sheets.

templates.name: Discord
templates.description: Talk to this agent from Discord — one-click connect via Eden's shared Discord app, a slash command named after the agent, and signature-verified interactions via eve's discordChannel.

templates.name: GitHub
templates.description: Talk to this agent by @mentioning it in GitHub issue and pull-request comments — a GitHub App with webhook signature verification via eve's githubChannel.

templates.name: Google Sheets
templates.description: Read and write Google Sheets from this agent. Install it, then click Connect Google on the agent's Deployment tab to authorize your account, and the agent gets google_sheets__* tools (read/append/update cells, metadata, batch updates) via eve's OpenAPI connection — access tokens self-refresh at runtime.

templates.name: Agent Browser
templates.description: Browser automation with the agent-browser CLI: navigate pages, inspect accessibility snapshots, click/fill by refs, capture screenshots, and run web QA from the sandbox shell.

templates.name: Building Cloudflare apps
templates.description: How to build a full-stack web app on Cloudflare Workers — a React + Vite SPA with a Worker API backend: choosing the scaffold, project layout, wrangler.jsonc semantics, the SPA-vs-Worker routing rules, the verify workflow, and bindings. Building only; deploying and shipping to a forge are separate skills.

templates.name: Deploying Cloudflare apps
templates.description: How to deploy an app to Cloudflare and provision what it needs — wrangler config and deploys, KV/D1/R2/Queues/Pages, dry-runs, and getting deploy credentials into a CI pipeline. Cloudflare only; getting the code and wiring a specific forge's pipeline are separate skills.

templates.name: Developer toolchain
templates.description: A broad developer toolchain preinstalled in the agent's sandbox — git, gh, jq, ripgrep, build tools, python3, pnpm/yarn, and friends — plus a skill inventorying what's there. A deliberate superset: install once, stop apt-getting per session.

templates.name: GitHub App auth
templates.description: Exchange the agent's GitHub App private key for a short-lived installation token (GH_TOKEN) and commit as the App's bot identity, with gh and git preinstalled in the sandbox — the credential mechanics every GitHub-using agent needs, and nothing else.

templates.name: Google Sheets usage
templates.description: Practical guidance for driving the google_sheets__* tools: A1 notation, read-before-write discipline, RAW vs USER_ENTERED, append vs update, and the batchUpdate request shapes for structural changes.

templates.name: Reviewing a pull request
templates.description: Two-axis PR review from a local checkout — standards (repo conventions plus a code-smell baseline) and spec (does it do what the issue asked) — delivered as one ranked review.

templates.name: Discord Send Message
templates.description: Send a message to a Discord channel by channel id via Eden's control plane, using the installation's shared Discord app — scoped to servers this agent is connected to.

templates.name: Web Search
templates.description: Search and research the live web, returning results and optional page content. Routes through a service that bypasses the bot protection blocking plain fetches, so use it whenever the agent needs to search or read the web.
